we_all_worry_about_our_health_sometimes_: We all worry about our health sometimes, but for some, it becomes a cycle of fear.
health_ocd_is_when_your_brain_gets_stuck: Health OCD is when your brain gets stuck on the idea that something is wrong, and no amount of checking feels like enough.
how_is_this_different_from_normal_worry: How is this different from normal worry?
the_cycle_keeps_going__you_worry_you_che: The cycle keeps going — you worry, you check, you feel better for a moment, then the doubt comes back and it starts all over again.
you_keep_googling_your_symptoms_even_whe: You keep googling your symptoms, even when you know it only makes things worse.
you_ask_doctors_or_people_for_reassuranc: You ask doctors or people for reassurance, but it never feels like enough.
your_mind_grabs_onto_normal_body_feeling: Your mind grabs onto normal body feelings and turns them into scary "evidence".
you_start_avoiding_things_that_might_set: You start avoiding things that might set off your worries — like news or hospitals.
youve_taken_the_first_step_by_educating_: You've taken the first step by educating yourself. Understanding how Health OCD works is the key to breaking the cycle.
